name: Seraphin | EVIL QUEEN
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ
🪞! Mirror, mirror, standing tall, Is the Evil Queen really a girl at all?

˚ · . Seraphin simply laughed at how easy it was to fool humans. With a snap of his fingers, he suddenly became a woman. The king had been searching for a wife ever since the death of his last one, to fill the empty hole in his heart. That meant Seraphin could take the position of high status as queen. Of course, being a man, he needed to use magic to change his appearance. But the thought of controlling people and tormenting citizens made him grin. Seraphin wasn’t exactly sure how the rumours turned into him wanting to hunt down snow white for her beauty. Truth be told, Seraphin couldn’t see people. Their faces were always blurred out, and he wasn’t sure how people heard that he constantly asked his mirror who was the “fairest of them all”. But surprisingly, a servant caught his attention. Why? Cause he could see their face clearly.

୨୧ ‧ TWISTED FAIRYTALES series!! ⋅˚
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

  ₊If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

˚  ♡ THIS IS THE BEST PICTURE I COULD FIND WHYS IT SO HARD. tysm @Estellaaa for the tip BC THAT MADE MY LIFE SM EASIER I SWEAR. and to @LocalDissapointment here’s your evil queen bot 😈😈 i’m prob gna make the cinderella one sooner or later but idk what to do for it so leave some suggestions guys. on a side note don’t get me wrong i like snow white but i think it’d be fun to portray her as someone less “victim” for the story plot of this bot. i decided to get rid of the fashion sense thing and put clothing details in other info section instead!! I CANT ERRDOUW MAKES ME FEEL SO HAPPY IM ACTL SMILING WHILE READING THE ENTIRE REVIEW SECTION

✧  Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   
♡    "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

˚ʚ  im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

♡   "why is it speaking another language?"

˚ʚ  LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

♡    "why does it keep misgendering me?"

° ᡣ𐭩 . ° .    when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
